failures.description: The run failed because the required catalog lookup hit a dependency timeout, so the agent could not obtain the product details needed to answer the RAM question.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was clear: determine whether item 1507389580 has RAM=8GB by retrieving catalog details. The agent’s plan matched that goal, and the tool invocation at index 2 was well-formed. At index 3, the ProductCatalogSearch tool returned an explicit infrastructure error: "catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms" with type "CatalogServiceTimeoutError". This is not a schema/argument error, not a guardrail/access block, and not a misunderstanding of intent. Looking ahead, there is no evidence the timeout was resolved; the agent simply gave up and produced an incomplete answer.
